anthropic-claude-sonnet-4-5.comment: Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Anthropic API. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env. Supports both regular API keys (sk-ant-api*) and Claude Code OAuth tokens (sk-ant-oat*, generated via `claude setup-token` — needs Claude Pro/Max subscription). OAuth tokens get the anthropic-beta header injected automatically.

anthropic-claude-haiku-4-5.comment: Claude Haiku 4.5 via Anthropic API — faster and cheaper. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env. Also supports Claude Code OAuth tokens (sk-ant-oat*) automatically.
